notes: Solid asteroids implementation with saucer, particles, waves, and lives system; minor issues include the saucer drawing using disconnected ellipses (looks odd), fire key using one-shot toggle that can miss rapid presses, and the pause/ESC conflict where ESC pauses instead of going to title.
Excellent implementation with saucer, particles, and proper vector graphics, though missing the classic hyperspace feature.

Solid playable Asteroids clone with waves, splitting, lives, saucer, and HUD, but controls/state handling are inconsistent (pause/title bindings, one-shot fire, respawn edge cases) and some classic behavior/polish is missing.
